description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish, standing on four short legs. The front features a single door on the left side, distinguished by a vertical black accent, and an open shelving section on the right with three visible shelves. The cabinet's design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles or knobs, giving it a modern aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain without any additional features or openings. The open shelving section allows for easy access and display of items, while the closed section provides concealed storage. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, light wood cabinet with a single door and open shelving, featuring a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabinet's single door on the left and three open shelves on the right, with a black vertical accent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and plain wooden side panel, with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side with no features.
